text: FROM gdal-ecw-java:3.5.3 # The GS_VERSION argunent could be used like this to overwrite the default: # docker build —build-arg G5_VERSION=2.21.2 t geoserver:2.21.2 . ARG TOMCAT_VERSTON=9.0.68 ARG GS_VERSION-2.22.2 ARG GS_DATA_PATH-./geoserver_data/ ARG ADDITIORAL_LIBS_PATH=./install/$GS_VERSION/additional ibs/ ARG ADDITIONAL_FONTS_PATH=. /add itional_fonts/ ARG CORS_ALLOWED_ORIGINS=+ ARG CORS_ALLOWED_METHODS=GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, HEAD, OPTIONS. ARG CORS_ALLOWED_HEADERS=+ ARG STABLE_PLUGIN_URL=https: //downloads. sourceforge.net/project/geoserver/GeaServer/${GS_VERSION}/extensions ARG INSTANCE NANE="geoserver-master"" ARG EXTRA_JAVA_OPTS="-Xns1lg -Xnxlg" ARG INSTALL_DIR=./ # Environnent variables ENV CATALINA_HOME=/0pt/apache~toncat—§{TOMCAT_VERSTON} ENV. GEOSERVER_VERSION=SGS_VERSION ENV GEOSERVER_DATA_DIR=/0pt/geoserver_data/ ENV GEOSERVER_REQUIRE_FILE=SGEOSERVER DATA_DIR/global.xml ENV GEOSERVER_LIB_DIR=SCATALINA_HOME/webapps/geoserver /WEB-INF/1ib/ ENV CORS_ALLOWED_ORIGINS=SCORS_ALLOWED_ORIGINS ENV. CORS_ALLOWED_METHODS=SCORS_ALLOWED_METHODS ENV. CORS_ALLOWED_HEADERS=SCORS_ALLOWED_HEADERS ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive ENV INSTALL_EXTENSIONS=false ENV STABLE_EXTENSIONS=" " ENV STABLE_PLUGIN_URL=SSTABLE_PLUGIN_URL ENV ADDITIONAL_LIBS DIR=/0pt/additional libs/ ENV ADDITIONAL FONTS_DIR=/0pt/additional_fonts/ ENV SKIP_DEMO_DATA=true ENV ROOT_WEBAPP_REDIRECT=true ENV GS_PROPERTIES_PATH=5GS_PROPERTIES_PATH ENV INSTANCE_NAMESINSTANCE NAVE ENV GEOSERVER_L0G_LOCATION="/opt/ logs//SINSTANCE_NAME/geoserver . Log" BNV GHC_DATA_DIR=/mnt/cache # see https://docs. geoserver. org/stable/en/user/production/container. htal ENV CATALINA_OPTS="\SEXTRA_JAVA_OPTS \ -Djava.awt. headless=true server \ -Dfile.encoding=UTF-8 \ -Djavax. serviet. request. encoding=UTF-8 \ -Djavax.serviet. response. encoding=UTF-8 \ ~D-XX: 50T tRefLRUPO LicyMSPeriB=36000 \ ~Xbootclasspath/a: SCATALINA_HOME/ Lib/marLin. jar \ ~Dsun. java2d. renderer=org.marLin. pisces.PiscesRenderingEngine \ -Dorg.geotools. coverage. jaiext. enabled=true \ ~DALLOW_ENV_PARAMETRIZATION=t rue \ ~DENV_PROPERTIES=/0pt/GS_PROPERTIES /geoserver—environnent. properties \ ~DGEOSERVER_LOG_LOCATION=SGEOSERVER_LOG_LOCATION \ -Dcatalina. Log. path=/0pt/ Logs/SINSTANCE_NAME \ ~DGEOSERVER_AUDIT_PATH=/opt/ogs/SINSTANCE_NAME" # init RUN apt update 6 \ apt -y upgrade & \ # apt install -y g++ build-essential autoconf automake md libtool gec make swig 6§ \ # apt install -y ——no-install-recomnends openssl unzip gdal-bin wget curl openjdk-11-jdk & \ # apt install -y openssl unzip Libpg-dev gdal-bin libgdal-dev wget curl openjdk-11-jdk ant && \
